economic_notes: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. accounted for by modified equity method. South Beach Casino income distribution received of $211,832 in 2021.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 not 2024. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: South Beach Casino LP (investment value $1,822,512) and Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. ($4,358). Six entities fully consolidated. Net debt position of $3,808,733. Prior year revenue in statement of operations shows $13,515,424 but segment totals show $13,322,957 due to reclassification. FNIHB revenue of $7,652,812 includes $4,982,950 directed to Shawano Consulting for Health Centre Project. Large surplus of $10,619,068 driven mainly by Capital and Housing segment surplus of $8,268,798 from deferred capital funding recognition. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statements.
